document_name: Official Denmark eIDAS NSIS GDPR Guidelines
description: Raw regulatory texts and guidelines governing Danish and EU digital identity, privacy, and data handling; primary inputs for compliance, policy framing, and risk assessment.
recency_requirement: Most recent amendments within the last 24 months
steps_to_find: Retrieve authoritative texts from the Danish Data Protection Agency site
Review EU GDPR portal and NSIS guidance
Cross-check with national eIDAS implementation documents

description: Raw national policies and procurement guidance relating to AltID and platform neutrality; inputs for strategy alignment and procurement framing.
steps_to_find: Search Digitaliseringsstyrelsen portal for AltID-related policies
Collect any publicly available AltID procurement guidelines
Review related Danish procurement regulations

description: Raw EU standards documentation related to eIDAS2, interoperability, and Digital Identity Wallet; input for standards engagement and conformity considerations.
steps_to_find: Search ETSI, CEN/CENELEC portals for relevant standards
Review EU Commission and EU Digital Identity Wallet related documents
Identify active working groups and proposal submission opportunities

description: Raw technical documentation of MitID architecture and interfaces to inform compatibility, integration risks, and fallback planning.
steps_to_find: Contact MitID operator and Digitaliseringsstyrelsen for architecture docs
Check official MitID developer/partner portals
Review public architecture overviews and integration guides

document_name: Danish Public Procurement Regulations for IT
description: Raw procurement texts governing public IT procurement practices and EU directive alignment relevant to AltID/MitID efforts.
steps_to_find: Inspect Danish procurement portals and legal repositories
Review EU directives integration into national practice
Consult with legal/regulatory teams for interpretation

document_name: Official Danish Data Protection Guidelines and EDPB Guidance
description: Raw GDPR and data protection guidelines applicable to public digital identity projects; inputs for privacy-by-design and data handling
steps_to_find: Retrieve DP Agency guidelines and GDPR materials
Review EDPB guidelines and a cross-border data transfer guidance
Check Danish implementation specifics

document_name: Official EU Digital Identity Wallet Standards Documentation
description: Raw EU-level documentation on interoperability and wallet standards used to align Danish advocacy with European requirements.
recency_requirement: Most recent version within last 24 months
steps_to_find: Identify EU standards bodies and working groups (ETSI, CEN/CENELEC) and EU Commission papers
Obtain working group outputs, proposals and guidelines
Review related conformity assessment guidance
